data.title: Abich Financial Wealth Management named one of Financial Planning's top 50 RIAs to work at, ranked no. 37.
data.description: Abich Financial Wealth Management, based in ASHBURN, Va., was recently named as the 37th best Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) to work for in 2025 by Financial Planning. This ranking was the result of a collaboration between Financial Planning and Best Companies Group, aiming to recognize organizations that prioritize employee well-being and foster a positive work environment. This accolade highlights Abich Financial Wealth Management's commitment to providing a top-notch workplace for its staff members.

data.title: RiverMeadow, in Los Gatos, presents new cloud migration tools with advanced capabilities, promising automated workload mobility.
data.description: In Los Gatos, California on December 11, 2025, RiverMeadow Software revealed a major enhancement to its offerings. The company, known for its expertise in workload mobility and modernization automation, introduced a comprehensive suite of advanced discovery and assessment features. This expansion aims to provide users with a fully integrated platform to better facilitate their needs.

data.title: Truth Initiative partners with Celebration Bowl to raise awareness of tobacco's impact on Black communities, providing cessation resources.
data.description: In Washington on December 11, 2025, Truth Initiative, the leading nonprofit public health organization in the country, announced an activation focused on promoting health equity and increasing availability of effective smoking cessation tools. This initiative aims to reach a large audience and provide vital resources. Truth Initiative's commitment to eradicating nicotine use is stronger than ever, with significant efforts being made in this direction.

data.title: iCIMS December Workforce Report shows late-year hiring strategies being adjusted across global markets.
data.description: iCIMS' December Workforce Report for 2025 provides detailed insights into labor market activities and job trends in the United States and Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) regions. The report, released by iCIMS, a prominent talent acquisition technology provider, offers comprehensive analysis of job popularity and workforce trends. This year-end report covers key statistics and data on job demand and activity in the mentioned regions.

data.title: Rexel reports total shares and voting rights as of Nov 30, 2025 in compliance with French regulations.
data.description: Rexel has released a statement regarding the total number of shares and voting rights in accordance with Article L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the rules set by the French Autorité des marchés financiers. This disclosure is important for transparency and regulatory purposes. Investors and stakeholders can review this information to understand the company's ownership structure and voting power.

data.title: New CEO Alejandro Garcia Mella joins Clicars in Spain, part of Aramis Group, leading automotive dealer.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global COVID-19 cases have surpassed 200 million, with over 4.2 million deaths recorded. Out of the total cases, approximately 190 million individuals have recovered. The United States, India, and Brazil are among the countries with the highest number of confirmed cases. The data suggests the need for continued vigilance and adherence to safety protocols to combat the spread of the virus. Additionally, vaccination efforts are ongoing worldwide, with over 4.5 billion doses administered so far. The situation emphasizes the importance of vaccination campaigns in achieving herd immunity and controlling the pandemic.

data.title: Rithum and Stripe partner to boost agentic commerce adoption, connecting brands/retailers with AI agents.
data.description: In Atlanta, a recent collaboration between Rithum and Stripe aims to link brands and retailers, enabling them to enhance product visibility for artificial intelligence agents. This new partnership is anticipated to increase exposure for a wide range of products, potentially reaching a substantially larger audience. The strategic alliance seeks to leverage the strengths of both companies, offering a promising opportunity for businesses to optimize their online presence and attract more customers through AI technology.

data.title: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage at 6.22%, near 2025 lows.
data.description: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, disclosed on December 11, 2025, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average rate of 6.22% according to its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ).

data.title: Futuro Health gets $1M from JPMorganChase to support healthcare workforce growth, address staffing shortages.
data.description: A recent announcement from Sacramento, California on Dec. 11, 2025 reveals the launch of the Healthcare Workforce Resilience Initiative (HWRI). This initiative is aimed at assisting healthcare employers, rural provider networks, and health plans in addressing workforce challenges and combating staffing shortages. Futuro Health has secured a substantial $1 million commitment to support this endeavor.

data.title: AstroTurf dominates 2025 college football postseason with 1 in 5 bowl games on its fields, showcasing leadership.
data.description: In Dalton, Georgia, on December 11, 2025, AstroTurf® will have a significant impact on the 2025 college football postseason as approximately 20% of all bowl games will be played on an AstroTurf field. This strong presence highlights AstroTurf's dominance in Division I college football, showcasing their influence on the sport.

data.title: BEYOND Developments introduces SIORA, a new vision for purposeful living on Dubai Islands.
data.description: A new vision for purposeful living on Dubai Islands is unveiled by BEYOND Developments through their project SIORA. The development aims to offer a unique lifestyle experience, with a focus on sustainability and community living. With an investment of over $500 million, SIORA promises to redefine luxury living in the region. The project is set to encompass state-of-the-art amenities and green spaces, catering to the needs of modern residents. This initiative reflects BEYOND Development's commitment to creating innovative and socially-conscious living spaces in Dubai.

data.title: Neros and Kela launch Archer Fiber, NDAA-compliant FPV drone, designed for electronic warfare. BlueUAS cleared, no Chinese parts.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Neros Technologies and Kela Technologies have revealed Archer Fiber, a pioneering NDAA-compliant fiber-optic FPV drone. This innovative platform is designed for superior performance in intense electronic warfare scenarios. Archer Fiber has obtained BlueUAS clearance after undergoing a thorough assessment at the component level to ensure no essential parts are sourced from China. Unlike competitors, this compliance is genuine rather than superficial, setting Archer Fiber apart in the market.

data.title: SnapLogic named a Visionary in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools for seventh year, based on Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, SnapLogic, known as the Agentic Integration Company, was recently recognized as a Visionary by Gartner in the Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools. The assessment considered the company's overall Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute, leading to this acknowledgment. SnapLogic aims to simplify the process of connecting systems, data, and applications for organizations. Dayle Hall, the Chief Marketing Officer at SnapLogic, highlighted the company's dedication to this vision.
